title: Anchoring Instruction
summary: Anchoring preparation, cable monitoring, and hourly position verification guidance.

excerpts.heading: Anchoring preparation
excerpts.summary: Confirm anchoring position, cable plan, and deck readiness before letting go the anchor.
excerpts.body: Before anchoring, verify charted position, swing circle, cable amount, under-keel clearance, bridge briefing, and forecastle readiness.

excerpts.heading: Hourly anchor position check
excerpts.summary: Record position, cable lead, weather, and nearby traffic at least hourly while anchored.
excerpts.body: During anchor watch, record vessel position, cable lead, weather and current, nearby traffic, and any sign of dragging at least every hour or more often if conditions worsen.
